ValidationRule.description: Display & Mandatory ONLY If ((LegalForm<>OEIC) AND (MaturityDate=Empty)) > Conflit avec Display conditionnel
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($User.BypassValidationRules__c), $Permission.PRPProductStrategy , Name = 'Proposal', OR ( ISPICKVAL(LegalForm__c, 'SICAV'), ISPICKVAL(LegalForm__c, 'FCP') ), ISBLANK(MaturityDate__c), OR(ISBLANK(RecommendedHoldingPeriod__c), ISBLANK(TEXT(RecommendedHoldingPeriodUnit__c)), ISBLANK(TEXT(RecommendedHoldingLabel__c))) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: If Legal Form <> OEIC and Maturity Date is blank, please provide values for Recommended Holding Period, Recommended Holding Period Unit and Recommended Holding Label.
